settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your AI agents, integrations, analysis preferences, and cycling biometrics.

aiAgents.title: AI Agents
aiAgents.subtitle: Customize your intelligence
aiAgents.description: Bring Your Own Key (BYOK). Enter your API keys to unlock advanced AI-powered training analysis.

intervals.title: Intervals.icu
intervals.subtitle: Sync workout data
intervals.description: Connect your Intervals.icu account to sync workout data and performance metrics automatically.

cycling.title: Cycling Settings
cycling.subtitle: Your profile data
cycling.description: Enter your cycling profile to enable accurate power-based training load calculations.

options.title: Options
options.subtitle: Analysis configuration
options.analyzeWithoutHRDescription: Enabling this will use Power (Watts) as the sole metric for training load calculations when HR data is missing.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.connectionRequired: Connect Intervals.icu in Settings to view your calendar.
calendar.loadError: Unable to retrieve calendar data right now.
calendar.performanceInsightsPlaceholder: Performance insights cards will connect to PMC metrics in a later step.
calendar.upcomingTrainingData: Upcoming training data is being fetched.
calendar.scrollToRetry: Keep scrolling to retry loading this part of the calendar.
calendar.importedWorkoutDetailsUnavailable: Intervals.icu did not expose detailed data for this imported workout.

coach.loadingError: Unable to load workouts right now.
coach.noWorkouts: No workouts found for this week.
coach.rpeDescription: Set the session effort before you save or start chatting with your coach.
coach.chatReady: Chat opens when you send the first message.
coach.chatRequiresRpe: Choose an RPE first to unlock coaching.
coach.chatSavedLocked: Summary saved. Click Edit to continue coaching.
coach.selectWorkoutPrompt: Select a workout from the left panel to begin your coach conversation.
coach.emptyStateBody: Choose one of your recent workouts to rate the effort, review the session, and chat with your coach.
coach.confirmWithoutChatBody: This workout does not have a coach conversation yet. Are you sure you want to save the summary without chatting first?
